/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/scanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/modules/wechat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/modules/wechat_v4_bin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/modules/qq_old.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chatshadow.dir/src/modules/qq_nt.cpp.o -o chatshadow  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl
